exercises.audioScript: This notice is in the interest of the students.
exercises.hindiScript: यह सूचना विद्यार्थियों के हित में है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Attendance of all members is compulsory.
Visit the website for more information.
All students must arrive on time.
This notice is in the interest of the students.
exercises.answer: This notice is in the interest of the students.

exercises.audioScript: It is mandatory to follow the deadline.
exercises.hindiScript: समय सीमा का पालन करना अनिवार्य है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This notice has been put up on the board.
Follow the above instructions.
This notice is for all employees.
It is mandatory to follow the deadline.
exercises.answer: It is mandatory to follow the deadline.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Contact the office for any questions.
This information is useful for everyone.
The office will be closed tomorrow.
Please keep your documents ready.

exercises.audioScript: This notice was circulated throughout the campus.
exercises.hindiScript: यह सूचना पूरे परिसर में प्रसारित की गई।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This notice is in the interest of the students.
Writing skills improve with practice.
This notice is effective immediately.
This notice was circulated throughout the campus.
exercises.answer: This notice was circulated throughout the campus.

exercises.audioScript: Visit the website for more information.
exercises.hindiScript: अधिक जानकारी के लिए वेबसाइट देखें।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: It is mandatory to follow the deadline.

Everyone should read this notice.
Visit the website for more information.
exercises.answer: Visit the website for more information.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Please keep your documents ready.

exercises.audioScript: This information is useful for everyone.
exercises.hindiScript: यह जानकारी सभी के लिए उपयोगी है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This notice was circulated throughout the campus.

This information is useful for everyone.
exercises.answer: This information is useful for everyone.

exercises.hindiScript: लेखन कौशल अभ्यास से सुधरता है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Visit the website for more information.
All students must arrive on time.

Writing skills improve with practice.

dictationPassage.text: This notice is in the interest of the students. It is mandatory to follow the deadline. Please keep your documents ready. This notice was circulated throughout the campus. Visit the website for more information.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: यह सूचना विद्यार्थियों के हित में है। समय सीमा का पालन करना अनिवार्य है। कृपया अपने दस्तावेज़ तैयार रखें। यह सूचना पूरे परिसर में प्रसारित की गई। अधिक जानकारी के लिए वेबसाइट देखें।
